<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

#### To save your first view

Click **{{< fa bookmark >}} Select Layout** and select **Save as New Configuration** to save changes as a new view.

#### To save additional views

Click **{{< fa bookmark >}} {View Name}*** where `{View Name}` is the name of your currently active view and select:

   - **Update Configuration** to save changes to the view you are currently editing.
   - **Save as New Configuration** to save changes as a new view.
